notes: Seed list of verification tickets created by the admin panel 'Seed' action. Each entry's seedSlug is unique and used for idempotency — re-running 'Seed' will skip slugs that already exist in Redis.

tickets.title: Verify Delta Force: movement + range stats
tickets.description: The detail page currently lists Lv.1 Atk 72 / Def 20 / HP 585 (read directly from the in-game Elite Force panel). Movement and range values are missing from the April 2026 preview panel. Confirm in-game once the unit is recruitable.

tickets.title: Verify Delta Force: per-level stat curve Lv.2–12
tickets.description: Only Lv.1 values are confirmed. Capture the full Lv.1→Lv.12 progression for Attack / Defense / HP / Movement / Range. HP (Lv.3) of 345 was read from a locked-tier tooltip and needs in-context verification.

tickets.title: Verify Delta Force: 3rd and 4th perk slots
tickets.description: The unit panel shows 4 perk hex icons (2 gold + 2 bronze). Only Camouflage Cover and Decapitation Strike are confirmed from screenshots. Capture and transcribe tooltips for the remaining 2 perks.

tickets.title: Verify Battleship Bismarck: defense + movement + range
tickets.description: Lv.1 Atk 86 and HP 685 are confirmed from the Elite Force panel. Defense, movement and range are missing. Confirm in-game once recruitable.

tickets.title: Verify Bismarck: per-level stat curve Lv.2–12
tickets.description: Only Lv.1 values are confirmed. HP (Lv.2) of 630 was read from a locked-tier tooltip and needs verification in-context. Capture the full Lv.1→Lv.12 progression.

tickets.title: Verify Bismarck: 4th perk slot
tickets.description: The unit panel shows 4 perk hex icons. Three tooltips are confirmed (Broadside Volley, Solitary Surge, Indomitable Will). Capture and transcribe the 4th perk tooltip.

tickets.title: Verify Dowding (trained): attribute stars in Marshal form
tickets.description: Community-wiki attributes (Inf 0/6, Arty 3/6, Tank 0/6, Air 6/6, Navy 0/6, March 1/6) are for the pre-training Silver form. With HP bonus climbing to 205% in the Marshal form, these very likely uplift. Capture a clean screenshot of the trained attribute grid and update.

tickets.title: Verify Dowding: 3rd signature skill tooltip
tickets.description: Preview panel shows three skill badges (Lv 5 / Lv 4 / Lv 1) but only two tooltips are captured: The Britannic Eagle and Dowding System. Capture the 3rd tooltip and add it to the skill slots.

tickets.title: Verify Dowding: Sword + Sceptre training stage costs
tickets.description: Add per-stage training cost breakdown (swords/sceptres/medals/merit) to data/wc4/generals/dowding.json under training.stages. Cross-reference other trained generals for format. Stages 1-4 for Sword, 5-8 for Sceptre is typical.

tickets.title: Verify Großdeutschland legend: numerical buff delta
tickets.description: Easytech's preview confirmed the legend's existence, target (Wehrmacht armor / mechanized infantry) and radial adjacency mechanic, but did not publish the exact numerical buff values (attack / defense / HP modifiers). Capture once in-game.

tickets.title: Verify 4th Guards Tank (Kantemirovskaya) legend: numerical buff delta
tickets.description: Like Großdeutschland — confirmed target (Red Army armor) and radial mechanic, but numerical buff delta needs to be captured from the in-game legend preview.

tickets.title: Verify Aerial Countermeasures perk rework
tickets.description: Easytech flagged the perk as 'optimized' in the April 2026 patch but did not publish the numerical delta. Compare the current in-game tooltip against the pre-patch wording documented in the tech notes, and update any general/unit entries that carry this perk.

tickets.title: Verify Battle of Berlin event: reward tiers per round
tickets.description: Confirmed: Defense type, 29 max survival rounds, 7-day rotation, April 17 debut. Still missing: the reward tier table (what you get at round 5 / 10 / 20 / 29). Populate once the event is live.
